results.rendered_html: sa—vyabhicāra m. (in phil.) an argument wide of the mark or incompatible with the conclusion drawn from it, an allegation proving too much (one of the Hetv-ābhāsas q.v.), a too general middle term (as ‘fire’ to prove smoke),  Nyāyas. ;  Sarvad.

results.rendered_html: savyabhicāra (2. sa + vya˚) adj. möglicher Weise falsch, nicht absolut zutreffend; m. Unsicherheit, Unbestimmtheit: hetvābhāsa  NYĀYAS. 1,2,45 . anaikāntikaḥ savyabhicāraḥ 46 .  SARVADARŚANAS. 114,6 . 7 .  TARKAS. 40 . ˚pūrvapakṣarahasya  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 241,b,10 . savyabhicāro nāma savyabhicaraṇaṃ yathā [Page7-0848] bhavedidamauṣadhamasminvyādhau yaugikamatha vā neti  CARAKA 3,8 .
